tools.name: Lockbit
tools.evidence_snippet: Lockbit continues to dominate as the most active ransomware in 2024.

tools.name: Clop
tools.evidence_snippet: Clop and AlphV have fallen from the top spots, replaced with Akira and newcomers Hunters International.

tools.name: AlphV
tools.evidence_snippet: ALPHV ransomware was identified in 5% of Mandiant led investigations in 2023.

tools.name: Hunters International
tools.evidence_snippet: Hunters International, a Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) operation, emerged in late 2023 following the disruption of the HIVE ransomware group by law enforcement.

cves.evidence_snippet: Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability CVE-2023-36025
Command injection vulnerability in Ivanti Connect Secure and Policy Secure CVE-2024-21887
Command injection vulnerability in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS software CVE-2024-3400
Exploited vulnerability with unknown parties in real-world attacks CVE-2023-6295
Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in Customer Support System 1.0 CVE-2023-51281
Directory Traversal vulnerability in NVIDIA Triton Inference Server CVE-2023-31036
Security feature bypass vulnerability in Microsoft Defender SmartScreen CVE-2024-21412
Zero-day vulnerability actively exploited in the wild CVE-2023-7024
Vulnerability being actively exploited in Ivanti Connect Secure CVE-2024-1709
Vulnerability being actively exploited in Ivanti Connect Secure CVE-2024-1708

ttps.evidence_snippet: Honeytoken Authentication Activity Detection Type: Triggered when a honeytoken, a decoy item placed in the system to detect unauthorized access, is accessed.
User Accessed Link in ZAP-Quarantined Email Detection Type: Raised when a user interacts with a link in an email that has been quarantined by the Zero-hour Auto Purge (ZAP) system.
A Suspicious File Was Observed Detection Type: Identified when a file is suspicious based on unusual characteristics or behavior.
Possible PlugX Activity Detection Type: Triggered by potential PlugX malware activity, used for data exfiltration and remote control.
Connection to Adversary-in-the-Middle (AiTM) Phishing Site Detection Type: Indicates a connection to a phishing site designed to intercept communications.
Unfamiliar Sign-in Properties Detection Type: Generated when sign-in attempts have properties not matching the user’s typical behavior.

summary: The 1H 2024 Threat Intelligence Report highlights emerging threats, including the rise of Hunters International ransomware group and Chinese state-sponsored cyber operations. The report emphasizes the importance of proactive measures, such as staying informed through advisories and enhancing cybersecurity maturity through best practices.
